data.title: 国际服主线Vol.1 第三章序章更新
data.summary: [Main Story Update Notice] The Main Story Vol. 1 Foreclosure Task Force Chapter 3 Prologue: "Traces
data.body:
[Main Story Update Notice]

The Main Story Vol. 1 Foreclosure Task Force Chapter 3 Prologue: "Traces of a Dream" has been revealed.

The Kaiser Group has withdrawn their forces, but the debt remains. Will the Foreclosure Task Force be able to protect their school against a new threat?
